page: OVHcloud d2-8 is an entry-level virtual server belonging to the Discovery family, running on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Core Processor (Haswell, no TSX) with 4 shared vCPUs and 4 physical cores operating at 2.0 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 8.0 GB of system memory, providing 2.0 GB per core, and is bundled with 50 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Network connectivity includes a baseline bandwidth of 0 Gbps and one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Performance benchmarks position this server in the lower tiers. Single-core CPU performance via stress-ng and Geekbench falls into the bottom 10%, while multi-core performance sits in the bottom 25%. Memory bandwidth tests show read-only large block speeds of 35.67 GB/sec and write speeds of 23.03 GB/sec, both ranking in the bottom 25%. Cryptographic and physics calculations also register in the bottom 10% to 25% ranges.

Given the shared CPU allocation and modest benchmark results, this server offers a cost-efficient entry point for non-production environments. It is best suited for lightweight workloads such as basic static web serving, software development testing, small Redis deployments, or simple database operations that do not require sustained high-performance compute resources.
description: OVHcloud d2-8 is an entry-level virtual server from the Discovery family, utilizing the KVM hypervisor. It is configured with 4 shared vCPUs on an Intel Haswell x86_64 architecture running at 2.0 GHz, paired with 8.0 GB of RAM and 50 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Benchmark results place its single-core and multi-core CPU performance in the lower percentiles, with memory bandwidth and database operations also ranking in the bottom quarter of tested systems. Lacking dedicated CPU resources or high-speed network baselines, this server is designed as a budget-friendly option for non-critical workloads. It is best suited for basic web serving, development environments, and lightweight testing.
og_description: OVHcloud d2-8 is a budget-friendly Discovery family virtual server featuring 4 shared Intel vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, and 50 GB NVMe SSD storage, designed primarily for entry-level development and testing workloads.

tagline: A budget-friendly virtual server with shared resources and local NVMe storage for basic development and testing workloads.

8.0 GB of system memory paired with 50 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
KVM hypervisor virtualization with one complimentary public IPv4 address
Suited for lightweight workloads including static web serving and development testing
